title: Fourth UK-EU Trade Cooperation Agreement Civil Society Forum meeting, 24 June 2025: apply for observer status
body: "You can register for observer status at the UK-EU Trade Cooperation Agreement (TCA) Civil Society Forum meeting on 24 June 2025.   The UK-EU Trade Cooperation Agreement (TCA) Civil Society Forum (CSF) meets for the fourth time on 24 June 2025, in London.   The CSF allows organisations that are not active participants, to observe the meeting virtually on 24 June 2025 (by video link).   To apply for observer status, fill in the UK CSF registration form and email at dagsecretariat@cabinetoffice.gov.uk by 23:59pm on 17 June 2025. We cannot accept forms after this time.  If you are an EU organisation, you should register on the EU homepage. "
